title: Outlined Blocks
description: Add a grid-like outline texture to blocks! compatible with resourcepacks
body:
**Added a grid-like outline to seamless blocks**

**Made it easier to count or whatever the reason you would need it**

## Compatible with resourcepacks
> **make sure Outlined Blocks always at the top to overrides any other resourcepacks**

![overrides](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ad11af4495c38d54d47dcc923791f1dcd8e9305_0.webp)
